summary: In‑your‑face sound that gets clearer as the show progresses, highlighted by a strong Scarlet > Fire performance.
review: The recording is generally good enough for casual listening – it improves in clarity later in the set and isn’t overly boomy according to most listeners. Musically the night shines on the Scarlet > Fire jam, though the opening of Truckin' is noted as a bit sloppy. Overall the show feels solid but not spectacular.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is average with one clear standout (Scarlet > Fire) and a minor slip on Truckin'; recording is decent, improving later, with only mild boomy complaints.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear enough for car listening; some listeners note low‑end boominess while others describe it as in‑your‑face. Quality improves noticeably as the concert goes on.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The first half is a bit uneven, but the performance tightens and sound improves in the later portion of the show.
